ctx.name: Carl
ctx.notes: They have been seen very upset about something

introQueue.label: What you're carrying
introQueue.name: What are you carrying into this conversation?
introQueue.description: Acknowledges people are not clean slates. Non-evaluative — carrying could be burden or gift.

introQueue.label: Team connection
introQueue.name: How connected do you feel to the rest of the team right now?
introQueue.description: Probes isolation or drift without naming it; one of the earliest signals of disengagement.

introQueue.label: Energy read
introQueue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
introQueue.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.
